en: The teacher is here.

ab: mayanga kivangavang, qiladju a kirimu tua sangel.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: sikalima qadaw tua singci tasauni, uri semekez nutiyaw, ari a kivangavang!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: nanguaq lja! ari a sema pana.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: sikatjelulj a qadaw nutiyaw, ari vaiki anga nu pasuvililj tua cengelj a benuru!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: uri anema su kudain nu tiyaw a kadjaman?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: niciyubi nutiyaw, uri sema kiukay amen kati kina.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: sa mutjaq aen, uri sema kaya en.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, saqetju a u tjiyalj, uri sema kaya en.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?

ab: palamu kisemekaz anga kitulu, vaiku anga nusauni.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, marusaqetju a u qulu, uri cingciya sa sekez nu pasuvililj tua cengalj.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: uri cingciyaen nu tjavililj a singci i, sa vaik aen a kipucemel.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Tjuku?

ab: saqetju a tjiyalj nimadju, i kaya timadju.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kuliu?

ab: sinsi, saqetju a liqu ni Kuliu, na cingciya tucu a qadaw.
en: Teacher, Kuliu has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: akumaya inikana mangtjez ti Tjuku kasauni?
en: Why didn’t Tjuku come?
She has a fever.
